task_description: Fix 3 issues: (1) Dinas Luar form/view not showing benefit nominal (uang harian, transport, hotel, makan), (2) SPPD-DinasLuar bidirectional integration not working from dinas luar side, (3) Portal karyawan navigation not clickable due to sidebar collapse and redirect bugs

verification.summary: All 3 JS files pass syntax validation. Integration checks confirm benefit display (getUserGrade, gradeJabatan, totalEstimasi), SPPD bidirectional link (hrd_perjalanan_dinas), approval propagation (dinasLuarId query), and SPPD collision fix (Math.random suffix) are all present. Review issues addressed.
